description: Intent routes: map task kinds to operating mode, risk, approvals, skills, playbooks, validators, evidence expectations, and forbidden shortcuts. Complements os-capabilities.json (fine-grained capability registry).

defaults.whenAmbiguous: Prefer the strictest matching route; escalate requiredApproval before execution.
defaults.registryCapabilityHint: Cross-check os-capabilities.json for additional os.* entrypoints when a route spans multiple surfaces.

routes.title: Release gate
routes.summary: Ship or tag with strict validation, playbook evidence, and documented residual risk.
expectedEvidence: Green os-validate strict profile (or recorded waiver with owner)
Playbook release.md evidence sections satisfied
docs/RELEASE-READINESS.md checklist or equivalent JSONL envelope
forbiddenShortcuts: Merging on quick profile alone for production-bound work
Skipping verify-examples when examples/schemas changed
Declaring release-ready while verify-playbooks -Strict fails

routes.title: Incident response
routes.summary: Stabilize production with narrow blast radius, explicit approvals, and rollback-ready evidence.
expectedEvidence: Incident playbook incident.md followed with timestamps and scope boundaries
Decision log entries for mitigations and rollbacks
Post-incident validation plan captured before closing
forbiddenShortcuts: Undocumented production config or secret edits
Broad refactors during active incident
Skipping rollback criteria from the incident playbook

routes.title: Migration
routes.summary: Plan and execute data or platform migrations with rehearsal, blast-radius limits, and validation gates.
expectedEvidence: migration.md preflight and validation steps executed or explicitly waived with approver
Rehearsal or dry-run notes for destructive steps
Contract checks when schemas or manifests change
forbiddenShortcuts: One-shot production migration without documented rollback
Skipping json contract checks after manifest edits
Running strict profile gates only after merge without prior rehearsal

routes.title: Project bootstrap
routes.summary: Scaffold or refresh .claude project artifacts from Claude OS templates with deterministic checks.
expectedEvidence: bootstrap-manifest critical paths satisfied after init-project
docs/PROJECT-BOOTSTRAP.md alignment for operators
Adapter copies refreshed when templates drift
forbiddenShortcuts: Hand-editing generated adapter copies without syncing from templates
Skipping verify-bootstrap-manifest after changing projectBootstrap lists
Omitting capability-manifest or os-capabilities from managed .claude copies

routes.title: Documentation contract audit
routes.summary: Align README, manifests, schemas, and validators without false-green language.
expectedEvidence: verify-doc-contract-consistency green after doc or manifest edits
docs-index.json references valid paths for touched sections
forbiddenShortcuts: Marking docs verified without running verify-doc-contract-consistency
Approving wording that equates warn or skip with pass
Changing INDEX summaries without updating bootstrap-manifest counts

routes.title: Adapter drift
routes.summary: Detect and repair drift between canonical adapter sources and generated copies.
expectedEvidence: verify-agent-adapters and drift checks recorded before merge
sync-agent-adapters.ps1 or equivalent when templates change
forbiddenShortcuts: Silencing adapter checks instead of syncing sources
Editing templates/adapters without running drift verification
Shipping rules that omit os-capabilities or route-capability references

routes.title: Skill authoring
routes.summary: Add or change canonical skills under source/skills with manifest, structure, and economy checks.
expectedEvidence: skills-manifest and bootstrap skill counts updated when adding skills
SKILL.md frontmatter passes verify-skills-structure
docs/SKILLS.md or handbook alignment when behavior changes
forbiddenShortcuts: Editing only .claude/skills in a project without updating source/skills in OS repo
Skipping verify-skills-drift after changing canonical skill bodies
Bypassing category or naming rules in skills-manifest

routes.title: Strict validation profile
routes.summary: Run full local validation stack including strict profiles and aggregate gates.
expectedEvidence: os-validate strict and os-validate-all envelopes green (or documented skips with reason)
Bash syntax checks satisfied when bash is available and required
forbiddenShortcuts: Treating warnings as merge blockers without classification (see docs/VALIDATION.md)
Running only verify-os-health while skipping os-validate strict for release-bound work
Ignoring verify-examples failures when JSON examples changed

routes.title: Security review
routes.summary: Review attack surface, secrets posture, permissions, and adapter boundaries before high-risk change.
expectedEvidence: Security policy verifier output archived for the change
Risk surface notes tied to decision log or playbook evidence
Adapter rules reviewed when execution or network scope changes
forbiddenShortcuts: Committing secrets, tokens, or personal paths into examples or manifests
Disabling verify-security-policy to unblock CI
Approving network or filesystem expansion without production-safety skill review
